zh.lifeSummary: 當Clemence de Bar於1110年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾時，她的父親Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar33歲，母親Gisèle de Vaudémont21歲。她於1137年與Renaud de Clermont II在法國諾門迪曼其波奧瓦斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在法國皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯享年90歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯沙吉米爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clemence de Bar于1110年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾时，她的父亲Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar33岁，母亲Gisèle de Vaudémont21岁。她于1137年与Renaud de Clermont II在法国諾門迪曼其波奧瓦斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在法国皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯享年90岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯沙吉米爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Clemence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clemence de Bar was born in 1110, in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, France, her father, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, was 33 and her mother, Gisèle de Vaudémont, was 21. She married Renaud de Clermont II in 1137, in Beauvais, Manche, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1200, in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 90, and was buried in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clemence de Bar est née en 1110, à Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Vaudémont, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud de Clermont II en 1137, à Beauvais, Manche, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clemence de Bar 1110 in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar 33 und ihre Mutter Gisèle de Vaudémont 21. Sie hat 1137 in Beauvais, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich Renaud de Clermont II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Bar è nata il nel 1110 nel Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, sua padre, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Gisèle de Vaudémont, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Renaud de Clermont II nel 1137, nel Beauvais, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1200, nel Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Clemence de Barが1110年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンダンマルティン-エン-ゴeルで生まれた時，父Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Barは33歳，母Gisèle de Vaudémontは21歳であった。1137年にフランスノーマンディマンチェビーウベイスでRenaud de Clermont IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年にフランスピカーディオイゼビーウベイスで90歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼサイント-ミヒエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Clemence de Bar(이)가 1110년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 다마틴--고e일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisèle de Vaudémont(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1137년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 보바이에서 Renaud de Clermont II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 프랑스 피카디 이스 보바이에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 세인트-미히얼에 묻혔다.

mn.Carrington, Cheshire, England: Carrington, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Bar nasceu em 1110, em Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud de Clermont II em 1137, em Beauvais, Manche, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, França, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clemence de Bar родилась в 1110 г. в местности даммартин-ен-гоeл, сине-ет-марн, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Vaudémont, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud de Clermont II в 1137 г. в местности бовеи, манч, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности бовеи, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-михиел, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clemence de Bar nació en 1110, en Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Renaud de Clermont II en 1137, en Beauvais, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1200, en Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
